title: 1981-04-16_Pat_89.txt
key_claims: Dick finally solves the mechanical mystery of 1974: The meta-abstraction caused his two brain hemispheres to become neurologically dysphasic. The recessive right hemisphere performed the abstraction, drastically accelerating its internal "change-rate velocity."
Because the right hemisphere's frequency sped up, the physical world *relative to that hemisphere* appeared to drastically slow down and regress backwards. This is a "Doppler shift to the red."
This Doppler shift caused the present (1974 California) to look like the ancient past (The Black Iron Prison / 1st Century Rome).

Therefore, *Anamnesis* (remembering a past life) is a cognitive illusion. Dick did not travel back in time, nor did he remember a past life; his brain sped up so fast that the present looked like the past.
recurring_concepts: **Temporal Parallaxis**: The phenomenon where one brain hemisphere sees the "ancient" past (the red-shifted physical world) while the other hemisphere sees the current present, providing a stereo view of time.
**Time as Change-Rate Velocity**: Dick abolishes the standard concept of time, replacing it purely with the speed at which complexity changes.
reading_excerpt: Dick finally solves the mechanical mystery of 1974: The meta-abstraction caused his two brain hemispheres to become neurologically dysphasic. The recessive right hemisphere performed the abstraction, drastically accelerating its internal "change-rate velocity."
